query:
-- Delete duplicate punches, keeping only the first one for each type per day
DELETE ae FROM attendance_events ae
INNER JOIN (
  SELECT 
    DATE(event_time) as work_date,
    worker_id,
    event_type,
    MIN(id) as first_id
  FROM attendance_events
  GROUP BY DATE(event_time), worker_id, event_type
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
) duplicates ON DATE(ae.event_time) = duplicates.work_date 
  AND ae.worker_id = duplicates.worker_id 
  AND ae.event_type = duplicates.event_type
  AND ae.id > duplicates.first_id;

DELETE ae FROM attendance_events ae
INNER JOIN (
  SELECT 
    DATE(event_time) as work_date,
    worker_id,
    event_type,
    MIN(id) as first_id
  FROM attendance_events
  GROUP BY DATE(event_time), worker_id, event_type
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
) duplicates ON DATE(ae.event_time) = duplicates.work_date 
  AND ae.worker_id = duplicates.worker_id 
  AND ae.event_type = duplicates.event_type
  AND ae.id > duplicates.first_id;
